headline: EBay Shouldn’t Sell to GameStop. That’s the Advice of This Famous Investor.
summary: GameStop  CEO Ryan Cohen has a bold plan to buy eBay, a much larger company than his. And he’s offering a lot of money—$56 billion, or $125 a share.  There’s the rub: eBay stock is hovering around $108, a sign that Wall Street doubts Cohen can pull off the deal.  Prominent money manager Bill Smead, whose firm has been an eBay stakeholder for nearly 20 years, is skeptical, too.

headline: Rate Cuts Are Coming: Here’s How to Position TLT, XLRE, and ITB Now
